creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-------- Forwarded Message --------
From: Dwayne Hart <dwayneh@ssimicro.com>
Subject: Re: kern/128282: [mpt] system failure on removing two drives

Hi,

As per your request, I've attached a verbose copy of the machine's dmesg.

Cheers,
Dwayne
